env.name: myfgm7
env.value: SHELL=/bin/bash WM_COMPILER=Gcc FOAM_SETTINGS=FOAMY_HEX_MESH=yes ParaView_INCLUDE_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64Gcc/ParaView-5.6.0/include/paraview-5.6 WSL2_GUI_APPS_ENABLED=1 WSL_DISTRO_NAME=Ubuntu WT_SESSION=04d820d6-7f42-44f3-8844-3e1e6bf6dc09 FOAM_MPI=openmpi-system ParaView_GL=mesa WM_PRECISION_OPTION=DP WM_PROJECT_USER_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/liujiayue-7 WM_MPLIB=SYSTEMOPENMPI FOAM_RUN=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/liujiayue-7/run FOAM_EXT_LIBBIN=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32/lib NAME=DESKTOP-NET2P3U PWD=/home/liujiayue FOAMY_HEX_MESH=yes LOGNAME=liujiayue WM_OPTIONS=linux64GccDPInt32Debug WM_ARCH=linux64 ParaView_MAJOR=5.6 FOAM_TUTORIALS=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/tutorials WM_LABEL_SIZE=32 WM_PROJECT=OpenFOAM FOAM_APPBIN=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/bin WM_THIRD_PARTY_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7 HOME=/home/liujiayue LANG=C.UTF-8 WSL_INTEROP=/run/WSL/434_interop WM_LABEL_OPTION=Int32 WM_CC=gcc LS_COLORS=rs=0:di=01;34:ln=01;36:mh=00:pi=40;33:so=01;35:do=01;35:bd=40;33;01:cd=40;33;01:or=40;31;01:mi=00:su=37;41:sg=30;43:ca=30;41:tw=30;42:ow=34;42:st=37;44:ex=01;32:*.tar=01;31:*.tgz=01;31:*.arc=01;31:*.arj=01;31:*.taz=01;31:*.lha=01;31:*.lz4=01;31:*.lzh=01;31:*.lzma=01;31:*.tlz=01;31:*.txz=01;31:*.tzo=01;31:*.t7z=01;31:*.zip=01;31:*.z=01;31:*.dz=01;31:*.gz=01;31:*.lrz=01;31:*.lz=01;31:*.lzo=01;31:*.xz=01;31:*.zst=01;31:*.tzst=01;31:*.bz2=01;31:*.bz=01;31:*.tbz=01;31:*.tbz2=01;31:*.tz=01;31:*.deb=01;31:*.rpm=01;31:*.jar=01;31:*.war=01;31:*.ear=01;31:*.sar=01;31:*.rar=01;31:*.alz=01;31:*.ace=01;31:*.zoo=01;31:*.cpio=01;31:*.7z=01;31:*.rz=01;31:*.cab=01;31:*.wim=01;31:*.swm=01;31:*.dwm=01;31:*.esd=01;31:*.jpg=01;35:*.jpeg=01;35:*.mjpg=01;35:*.mjpeg=01;35:*.gif=01;35:*.bmp=01;35:*.pbm=01;35:*.pgm=01;35:*.ppm=01;35:*.tga=01;35:*.xbm=01;35:*.xpm=01;35:*.tif=01;35:*.tiff=01;35:*.png=01;35:*.svg=01;35:*.svgz=01;35:*.mng=01;35:*.pcx=01;35:*.mov=01;35:*.mpg=01;35:*.mpeg=01;35:*.m2v=01;35:*.mkv=01;35:*.webm=01;35:*.ogm=01;35:*.mp4=01;35:*.m4v=01;35:*.mp4v=01;35:*.vob=01;35:*.qt=01;35:*.nuv=01;35:*.wmv=01;35:*.asf=01;35:*.rm=01;35:*.rmvb=01;35:*.flc=01;35:*.avi=01;35:*.fli=01;35:*.flv=01;35:*.gl=01;35:*.dl=01;35:*.xcf=01;35:*.xwd=01;35:*.yuv=01;35:*.cgm=01;35:*.emf=01;35:*.ogv=01;35:*.ogx=01;35:*.aac=00;36:*.au=00;36:*.flac=00;36:*.m4a=00;36:*.mid=00;36:*.midi=00;36:*.mka=00;36:*.mp3=00;36:*.mpc=00;36:*.ogg=00;36:*.ra=00;36:*.wav=00;36:*.oga=00;36:*.opus=00;36:*.spx=00;36:*.xspf=00;36: WM_CFLAGS=-m64 -fPIC FOAM_JOB_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/jobControl FOAM_LIBBIN=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/lib WM_LINK_LANGUAGE=c++ WAYLAND_DISPLAY=wayland-0 ParaView_VERSION=5.6.0 ParaView_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64Gcc/ParaView-5.6.0 FOAM_ETC=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/etc FGM_SOLVER_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/liujiayue-7/applications/MyFGMFoam/applications/solver FOAM_UTILITIES=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/applications/utilities FOAM_SITE_LIBBIN=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/site/7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/lib WM_OSTYPE=POSIX WM_PROJECT_VERSION=7 LESSCLOSE=/usr/bin/lesspipe %s %s WM_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/wmake TERM=xterm-256color FOAM_SITE_APPBIN=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/site/7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/bin WM_ARCH_OPTION=64 LESSOPEN=| /usr/bin/lesspipe %s USER=liujiayue WM_CXXFLAGS=-m64 -fPIC -std=c++0x MPI_ARCH_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi WM_PROJECT_INST_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7 FOAM_SRC=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/src DISPLAY=:0 SHLVL=1 FOAM_USER_LIBBIN=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/liujiayue-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/lib FOAM_APP=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/applications WM_LDFLAGS=-m64 WM_CXX=g++ LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64Gcc/gperftools-svn/lib:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64Gcc/ParaView-5.6.0/lib/paraview-5.6:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/lib/openmpi-system:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32/lib/openmpi-system:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/liujiayue-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/lib:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/site/7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/lib:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/lib:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32/lib:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/lib/dummy XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/mnt/wslg/runtime-dir WM_COMPILE_OPTION=Debug FOAM_INST_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7 WSLENV=WT_SESSION:WT_PROFILE_ID: MPI_BUFFER_SIZE=20000000 ParaView_TYPE=ThirdParty FOAM_SOLVERS=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/applications/solvers WM_PROJECT_DIR=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7 LIB_FGM_SRC=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/liujiayue-7/applications/MyFGMFoam/src WM_COMPILER_TYPE=system XDG_DATA_DIRS=/usr/local/share:/usr/share:/var/lib/snapd/desktop FOAM_USER_APPBIN=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/liujiayue-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/bin PATH=/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64Gcc/gperftools-svn/bin:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/ThirdParty-7/platforms/linux64Gcc/ParaView-5.6.0/bin:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/liujiayue-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/bin:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/site/7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/bin:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/platforms/linux64GccDPInt32Debug/bin:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/bin:/home/liujiayue/OpenFOAM/of7/OpenFOAM-7/wmake:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/games:/usr/lib/wsl/lib:/mnt/d/Program:Files/NVIDIA:GPU:Computing:Toolkit/CUDA/v12.4/bin:/mnt/d/Program:Files/NVIDIA:GPU:Computing:Toolkit/CUDA/v12.4/libnvvp:/mnt/c/WINDOWS/system32:/mnt/c/WINDOWS:/mnt/c/WINDOWS/System32/Wbem:/mnt/c/WINDOWS/System32/WindowsPowerShell/v1.0/:/mnt/c/WINDOWS/System32/OpenSSH/:/mnt/c/Program:Files/Git/cmd:/mnt/d/Program:Files/MATLAB/R2022a/bin:/mnt/d/anaconda3/Library/bin/:/mnt/d/anaconda3/Scripts/:/mnt/d/anaconda3/:/mnt/d/anaconda3/Library/usr/bin/:/mnt/d/anaconda3/Library/mingw-w64/bin:/mnt/c/Program:Files/NVIDIA:Corporation/Nsight:Compute:2024.1.1/:/mnt/c/Program:Files:(x86)/NVIDIA:Corporation/PhysX/Common:/mnt/c/Program:Files/NVIDIA:Corporation/NVIDIA:NvDLISR:/mnt/c/Program:Files:(x86)/Windows:Kits/8.1/Windows:Performance:Toolkit/:/mnt/c/Program:Files:(x86)/Microsoft:Visual:Studio/2022/BuildTools/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.44.35207/bin/Hostx64/x64:/mnt/d/ProgramFiles/Docker/resources/bin:/mnt/c/Users/LJYue/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps:/mnt/d/Program:Files/JetBrains/PyCharm:Community:Edition:2024.3.1.1/bin:/mnt/d/Users/LJYue/AppData/Local/Programs/Microsoft:VS:Code/bin:/mnt/d/Program:Files:(x86)/REFPROP/:/mnt/d/Users/LJYue/AppData/Local/Programs/CLion:2026.1.1/bin:/snap/bin project.component: { "keyToString": { "CMake 应用程序.MyFGMFoam.executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "shuangqing", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "org.rust.first.attach.projects": "true", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "CMakeSettings", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
